en: Hey dad, do you know what daunting means?
Daunting means, making you feel slightly frightened or worried about your ability to achieve something.
Can you give me an example?
Few things are more daunting than having to speak in front of a large crowd.
So here, you like speaking in front of a large crowd, right?
No no no Kevin. It's the opposite, I hate it.
If something is daunting, you feel that you should not try it, because it will be very difficult.
Oh I see, so daunting means, very difficult to do or deal with, right?
Exactly. For example, I believe vaccinating billions of people against COVID-19, is going to be a daunting challenge.
For me, going to school again, will be a daunting challenge.
